columns.name: TimeGenerated
columns.description: The timestamp (UTC) reflecting the time at which the event was ingested.

columns.name: EventTime
columns.description: The timestamp (UTC) reflecting the time at which the event was generated by ContosoFort.

columns.name: EventType
columns.description: Type of the event, e.g., NetworkAlert, ThreatDetected, PolicyViolation, Audit.

columns.name: Severity
columns.description: Severity of the event: Critical, High, Medium, Low, or Informational.

columns.name: Action
columns.description: Action taken by ContosoFort: Allow, Block, Monitor, or Quarantine.

columns.name: SourceIP
columns.description: Source IP address of the network event.

columns.name: DestinationIP
columns.description: Destination IP address of the network event.

columns.name: ThreatName
columns.description: Specific threat name or signature identified.

columns.name: RuleID
columns.description: Identifier of the ContosoFort rule that triggered the event.
